negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: human_271
prompt: The video opens with a ballerina in a white tutu and pointe shoes standing in the center of a crosswalk at an urban intersection. The scene is set during the daytime under clear skies, with sunlight casting soft shadows on the pavement. The ballerina is positioned between two yellow traffic poles. Behind her, a traffic light stands on a pole, and a few cars are parked along the curb. The background features a mix of trees and buildings. As the video progresses, the ballerina begins to move, transitioning from a standing position to performing a ballet leap. She extends her body into an arabesque position, arms gracefully raised and legs split, maintaining this pose mid-air momentarily before landing smoothly back on the ground. The final frame captures her continuing her dance across the intersection, her movements fluid and elegant against the backdrop of the cityscape.
